dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 839 RH: No Federal Expansion Designation in West Texas Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Arrington introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on January 31, 2025

form.official-title: To prohibit the implementation of a Land Protection Plan for Muleshoe National Wildlife Refuge.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the No Federal Expansion Designation in West Texas Act or the No FED in West Texas Act.

section.header: Implementation of Land Protection Plan for Muleshoe National Wildlife Refuge prohibited
section.text: The Secretary of the Interior may not finalize, implement, administer, or enforce the Land Protection Plan described in the document published by the United States Fish and Wildlife Service titled Final Land Protection Plan & Environmental Assessment Muleshoe National Wildlife Refuge (February 2023).

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
